message:
feat(cli,events,server): validate session names, enrich attention events API response

Harden resolveAssignProjectDir, resolveHandoffProjectDir, and
resolveProjectDir to return errors instead of empty strings, and add
tmux.ValidateSessionName guards to reject path-traversal session names.
Rename containsString to containsReplayWarning for clarity. Expand the
/api/v1/attention/events response payload with cursor bounds,
event count, truncation, and optional replay/reconstruction/incident
fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
